question: What is the concept of on-resin head-to-tail cyclization?
options: Cyclizing the peptide while still attached to the resin through activation of the C-terminal residue
Cleaving the peptide first then cyclizing
A type of side chain modification
explanation: On-resin cyclization activates the C-terminal carboxyl group (on resin) for intramolecular reaction with the N-terminal amine, forming a cyclic peptide before cleavage.
